Glaucoma Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are glaucoma tests? 
Glaucoma tests are eye tests that help diagnose glaucoma. Glaucoma is a group of eye diseases that can damage a nerve in the back of your eye called the optic nerve . This nerve connects your eyes to your brain, allowing you to see. Damage to the optic nerve can cause vision loss and blindness . Glaucoma tests can help find the disease before you know you have it, so
